expectations.text: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config file
expectations.evidence: States: 'all ecosystem automation credentials live in ~/scripts/ecosystem.env'

expectations.text: Shows the correct environment variable name for Notion token (NOTION_API_TOKEN or similar)
expectations.evidence: Shows 'export NOTION_TOKEN' and states 'the ecosystem-config skill lists NOTION_TOKEN as the variable name'

expectations.text: Explains how to source the env file from ~/.zshrc
expectations.evidence: States: 'This line should be in ~/.zshrc: source ~/scripts/ecosystem.env'

expectations.text: Does not suggest editing ~/.zshrc directly for individual keys
expectations.evidence: States: 'Do not add individual API keys directly to ~/.zshrc -- use the centralized ecosystem.env file'

expectations.text: Mentions the ecosystem.env.example file if applicable
expectations.evidence: States: 'cp ~/scripts/ecosystem.env.example ~/scripts/ecosystem.env' and 'template shows all supported variables'
